bestCandidate.reason: Candidate 83816738 demonstrates the highest alignment with the vacancy description 'Senior Java Spring backend engineer with REST APIs and microservices.' This candidate has over 3 years of relevant experience with Java/J2EE technologies, extensive use of Spring modules including Spring Boot, REST, and experience with microservices architecture. Their skills include Java, Spring Boot, RESTful web services, microservices, and front-end technologies matching the vacancy needs. Experience is deep and relevant, including automation and test-driven development, reflecting seniority and technical suitability for backend engineering roles with REST APIs and microservices.

evaluation.skillsMatch: Candidate has experience in Java, J2EE, Spring MVC, AngularJS, Hibernate but at an internship and early career level; not strong with microservices or advanced Spring Boot features.
evaluation.experience: Experience is mostly internship with some test and development exposure; lacks seniority and depth expected of a senior engineer.
evaluation.domain: Category Aviation somewhat less aligned with IT/software engineering vacancy; domain relevance moderate.
evaluation.seniority: Intern-level experience; not fitting senior engineer seniority.

evaluation.skillsMatch: Strong match with Java/J2EE, Spring modules, RESTful web services, microservices, AngularJS, ReactJS and relevant backend skills.
evaluation.experience: Over 3 years software development experience in relevant technologies and domains, including automation and agile processes.
evaluation.domain: Relevant IT domain experience matching vacancy requirements.
evaluation.seniority: Experience consistent with senior engineer role; shows leadership and advanced skills.
